title: Hemestheum thelypteris
taxonomy: Hemestheum thelypteris is classified under the family Lamiaceae. It belongs to the genus Hemestheum, which is a small group of flowering plants. The species Hemestheum thelypteris is native to Australia and New South Wales. Further classification of the species includes it being a perennial herb with distinctive leaf and flower characteristics. It is a relatively rare and understudied species within the Lamiaceae family.
